Home › Brevard County › Melbourne › Pescatarian Restaurants

Pescatarian Restaurants in Melbourne

13 restaurants with pescatarian options in Melbourne, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 4 currently hold an A, on an average 4.2-star diner rating.

13 pescatarian restaurants

  • A 98 G
    GRILLS RIVERSIDE American ★ 4.4 (7554) Melbourne · Brevard County VegGF +5 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 97 T
    TELYS CHINESE RESTAURANT LLC Chinese ★ 4.5 (953) Melbourne · Brevard County VeganVeg +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
